title: Early Game Advantage and Match Duration in Professional League of Legends
description: A DSC 80 final project analyzing professional League of Legends data from Oracle's Elixir to study whether early-game statistics at 15 minutes can predict match duration.

title: U.S. Infant Mortality Racial Disparities Analysis
description: A data analysis project using CDC datasets to study racial disparities in infant mortality, applying SQL, Python, logistic regression, and permutation tests to uncover statistical drivers.

title: Campus Class Discovery Web App
description: A full-stack web app built with Next.js and React that helps students discover, bookmark, and track ongoing and upcoming university classes, with dynamic filtering by building and meeting days.
